visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark, disheveled hair and a beard. He is wearing a red, quilted jacket over a plaid shirt. The audio opens with a man letting out a deep, guttural, and menacing growl, "Hah." His mouth is wide open as if he is shouting or gasping in anger. His expression is intense and aggressive. The background is a dimly lit interior, with a light-colored door frame to his left and a framed picture on the wall behind him. The camera remains steady, capturing his raw emotion. His voice is low and filled with rage as he continues, "And I'll toss." The man turns his head to the side, his expression shifting to one of stern determination. He continues to look off-camera, his face still conveying a sense of anger. The camera follows his movement slightly, maintaining the close-up framing. The background remains the same, showing the interior of the room. The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the man from the waist up. He is now seen from behind, standing in a bedroom.
